title: convolvulus scammonia var. pseudoscammonia
intro: Convolvulus scammonia var. pseudoscammonia, also known as Scammony or Wild Bole, is a plant species in the family Convolvulaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include being a purgative and a stimulant. The health benefits of Convolvulus scammonia var. pseudoscammonia include its use in treating constipation, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Convolvulus scammonia var. pseudoscammonia can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as tinctures, decoctions, and infusions, although its use should be under the guidance of a medical professional due to its potential side effects.
